name: Goliath || Complex Messiah
description:
Peace Be Thy Name, Havok Be Thy Game.

Goliath, the omen child, the complex messiah, and the holy conductor made of stone...

Choose who's side you'll be on. Goliath's Rebellion, Abrahm Servants, or the Lone Survivors.

Will Ryan wanted a character that suffers far greater and still pushes onward. Comes from accidental circumstance, has his whole world taken from him and so much more. Does not mean Will can’t give him a challenge. It’s Goliath's fighting spirit that counts for him.

Will wants him to push onward because it makes him push onward. It brings him hope, and he hopes that it brings the fans hope as well.

Part 2 of my IRIS series.
